id.description: Globally unique identifier for this register.

description.description: A description of the purpose and scope of this register.

lastUpdated.description: The date this register was last updated.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of the registrar.

registrar.description: The organisation responsible for maintaining this register.

entries.description: The list of software implementers in this register.

description: A register of software solutions that implement the UN Transparency Protocol (UNTP).

id.description: Globally unique identifier for this implementer entry.

name.description: Organisation name of the software implementer.

description.description: Implementation statement describing the organisation's commitment to UNTP.

registrationCountry.description: Country where the organisation is registered.

operatingCountries.description: Countries or regions where the organisation operates (e.g. 'Global', 'Canada').

commitmentDate.description: Date the organisation committed to UNTP implementation.

pilotParticipation.description: Whether the organisation participates in pre-release UNTP pilots.

untpScope.description: The UNTP specification components in scope for this implementer.

status.description: Current implementation status: planned (committed), active (in development), conformant (passed tests).

industryFocus.description: Industry sectors and process areas targeted by this implementer.

SoftwareImplementerEntry.description: A registered software implementer of UNTP specifications.

untpScope.description: UNTP specification components implemented by this product.

testResults.description: Results of UNTP conformity testing for this product.

SoftwareProduct.description: A software product that implements one or more UNTP specifications.

softwareVersion.description: The version of the software product tested.

untpVersion.description: The UNTP specification version tested against.

testSuite.description: Name or identifier of the test suite used.

evidenceCredentialURL.description: URL of the verifiable credential evidencing the test result from the UNTP test playground.

TestResult.description: A test result for a specific software version against a specific UNTP version.

processFocus.description: Specific process or credential focus within the sector.

untpUsage.description: UNTP components most relevant to this industry focus.

IndustryFocus.description: An industry sector and process focus for a software implementer.
